subject: WS1.4 specialist reviewers dispatched
body:
Coordinator update from Luminous Threading Asteroid.

I dispatched read-only specialist reviewers for WS1.4: type-expert, assumptions-expert, and test-expert. Solar also has the non-overlapping review-prep support task.

Hold staging/commit until review outputs are back or I route otherwise. Cached staged set is currently empty and your implementation claim cdeae6ac remains the only active claim I see.
